message:
feat(tests): add SDK integration test suite and update issue tracker

tests/sdk_integration.rs (561 lines):
- Comprehensive integration tests for the SDK public API including
  session creation, event listener lifecycle, RPC type serialization,
  transport abstraction, and callback wiring
- Exercises EventListeners subscribe/unsubscribe/notify paths,
  SessionOptions callback wiring, and AgentSessionHandle accessors

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update issue statuses reflecting SDK transport and integration
  test completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -251,7 +251,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1pqf","title":"Define snapshot protocol + layout","description":"# Goal
Establish the exact snapshot protocol to ensure artifacts are reproducible and unmodified.

# Deliverables
- Folder layout standard under tests/ext_conformance/artifacts (npm/, third-party/, templates/, etc.).
- Naming conventions and metadata requirements.
- Integrity checklist (checksums, source URLs, version pins).

# Notes
This protocol must be followed by all acquisition tasks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:26:08.948586875Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:01:09.845050436Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:01:09.844948095Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1pqf","depends_on_id":"bd-2oal","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:26:08.970315767Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":337,"issue_id":"bd-1pqf","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Background: Artifact snapshotting must be consistent to make tests repeatable.

Reasoning: A single protocol avoids ad‑hoc layouts and missing metadata.

Considerations: Include checksum generation and a manifest format that can be validated automatically.","created_at":"2026-02-05T07:50:36Z"},{"id":663,"issue_id":"bd-1pqf","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed: snapshot protocol codified in src/conformance.rs::snapshot module.

Deliverables:
1. **Folder layout standard**: ARTIFACT_ROOT, TIER_SCOPED_DIRS, EXCLUDED_DIRS, FIXTURE_DIRS constants codify the canonical layout. SourceTier enum maps tier → directory prefix.
2. **Naming conventions**: validate_id() enforces lowercase ASCII + digits + hyphens + slashes. validate_directory() ensures tier-scoped prefixes match. ArtifactSpec struct captures all required metadata.
3. **Integrity checklist**: digest_artifact_dir() computes deterministic SHA-256 directory digest. verify_integrity() checks digest against expected value. validate_artifact_spec() validates all metadata fields including source provenance (Git/Npm/Url).

Tests:
- 17 unit tests in src/conformance.rs (naming, directory, spec, digest, integrity, serde)
- 2 integration tests in tests/ext_conformance_artifacts.rs:
  - test_snapshot_protocol_provenance_entries_valid: validates ALL 208 provenance entries
  - test_snapshot_protocol_digest_matches_local_implementation: cross-checks lib vs test digest

Also fixed clippy error in agent_cx.rs (_cx → cx underscore binding).","created_at":"2026-02-07T04:01:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1q1p","title":"Fix: --theme validation should happen before --version early exit","description":"Bug: when running `pi --theme nonexistent.json --version`, the --version flag causes an early return before theme validation, so invalid themes are silently ignored.

## Expected Behavior
Invalid --theme should error even when combined with --version.

## Current Behavior (before fix)
--version short-circuits on line 83-86 of main.rs, theme validation is never reached.

## Fix Applied
- Moved early theme validation for path-like specs before --version check
- Made `looks_like_theme_path` public in theme.rs
- Named themes (without .json, /, ~) still validated later after resource loading

## Status
Fix is complete but codebase has 56 unrelated compile errors from other agents' work. Fix will pass tests once those are resolved.

## Test
`cargo test e2e_cli_theme` - all 4 tests should pass after codebase compiles","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-05T02:30:28.081870763Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T02:37:19.459347331Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T02:37:19.459284925Z","close_reason":"Fix committed - theme path validation now happens before --version check","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":241,"issue_id":"bd-1q1p","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"PearlTower picking this up now: validate --theme before --version early exit in src/main.rs, then run cargo test e2e_cli_theme_flag_invalid_path and full quality gates.","created_at":"2026-02-05T02:33:02Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1q3yj","title":"FUZZ-P2.7: Config libfuzzer harness — fuzz Config/ExtensionRiskConfig deserialization","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-14T16:58:42.128782295Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T22:26:20.305923584Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T22:26:20.305897185Z","close_reason":"Implemented config fuzz harnesses and target registration; validation blocked by unrelated provider compile errors","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","fuzz","libfuzzer"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1q3yj","depends_on_id":"bd-291y7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T16:59:02.161447618Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":1483,"issue_id":"bd-1q3yj","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## FUZZ-P2.7: Config libfuzzer Harness

### Harness Design

```rust
// fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config.rs
#\![no_main]
use libfuzzer_sys::fuzz_target;

fuzz_target\!(|data: &[u8]| {
    if let Ok(s) = std::str::from_utf8(data) {
        // Attempt to deserialize as Config
        let _: Result<Config, _> = serde_json::from_str(s);
        
        // Also fuzz sub-structs directly
        let _: Result<ExtensionRiskConfig, _> = serde_json::from_str(s);
        let _: Result<CompactionSettings, _> = serde_json::from_str(s);
        let _: Result<ExtensionPolicyConfig, _> = serde_json::from_str(s);
    }
});
```

### Second Harness: Config loading from file

```rust
// fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config_load.rs
#\![no_main]
use libfuzzer_sys::fuzz_target;

fuzz_target\!(|data: &[u8]| {
    let dir = tempfile::tempdir().unwrap();
    let path = dir.path().join("settings.json");
    std::fs::write(&path, data).unwrap();
    
    // load_config reads and merges multiple config files
    let _ = Config::load_from_path(&path);
});
```

### Key Focus: Float Boundary Values
ExtensionRiskConfig.alpha (EWMA smoothing factor) has NO validation:
- alpha = NaN → EWMA produces NaN forever (poison)
- alpha = Infinity → EWMA overflows
- alpha = -1.0 → EWMA produces oscillating values
- alpha = 0.0 → EWMA ignores new data (stuck at initial value)
- alpha = 1.0 → EWMA ignores history (no smoothing)

These should all be caught and rejected during deserialization or config loading.

### Seed Corpus
- Valid settings.json from the project's test fixtures
- Minimal valid config: {}
- Config with all fields set to default values
- Config with all fields set to extreme values

### Files to Create
- fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config.rs
- fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config_load.rs
- fuzz/corpus/fuzz_config/ (seed configs)

### Acceptance Criteria
- Both harnesses compile and run
- Float boundary values (NaN, Inf) either produce errors or are clamped
- 5-minute fuzz run completes without crashes","created_at":"2026-02-14T17:01:57Z"},{"id":1619,"issue_id":"bd-1q3yj","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed implementation for `bd-1q3yj`:

Files added:
- `fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config.rs`
- `fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config_load.rs`

File updated:
- `fuzz/Cargo.toml`
  - added `[[bin]]` entries for `fuzz_config` and `fuzz_config_load`

Corpus alignment:
- reused/confirmed `fuzz/corpus/fuzz_config/` seeds
- confirmed `fuzz/corpus/fuzz_config_load/` has 10 seeds

Verification:
- `rustfmt --check fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config.rs fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config_load.rs` passed
- attempted targeted compile via:
  - `rch exec -- cargo check --manifest-path fuzz/Cargo.toml --bin fuzz_config --bin fuzz_config_load`
- compile currently blocked by unrelated workspace errors in provider code (`src/providers/anthropic.rs` currently failing in shared branch state)

Result:
- Harness + registration work is complete.
- Runtime/compile validation must be re-run once shared provider compile blockers are resolved.
","created_at":"2026-02-14T22:26:17Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1qk8","title":"pi_agent_rust: migrate sibling deps from path= to version-only + local patch workflow","description":"# Goal
Make `pi_agent_rust` buildable without a sibling checkout by removing `path = ../...` dependencies once the sibling crates are published.

# Current State
`Cargo.toml` uses `version = ...` + `path = ../...` for:
- asupersync
- rich_rust
- charmed_* crates
- sqlmodel_* crates

This is perfect for local dev, but prevents a “pure ecosystem” build.

# Plan
1) Convert dependencies to version-only (no `path =`).
2) Add a documented local-dev override strategy:
   - Preferred: `[patch.crates-io]` entries pointing to sibling paths for developers.
   - Alternative: a `cargo` config snippet or `justfile` (only if patch is insufficient).
3) Add CI proof:
   - A job that builds `pi_agent_rust` with patches disabled (or in a fresh checkout without sibling repos) to ensure we truly depend on published crates.

# Acceptance
- `cargo build` succeeds in an environment with no sibling repos present.
- Local-dev still works with documented patches.
- No behavior changes.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:30:45.048638287Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T06:22:40.487385046Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T06:22:40.487313223Z","close_reason":"Complete: all path= deps removed, Cargo.lock uses crates.io registry, local-dev [patch.crates-io] section documented in Cargo.toml lines 161-187, CI (ci.yml) proves build works without sibling repos","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["crates","deps","pi_agent_rust"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-19he","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:39.843937035Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1dl9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:34.493436936Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1imi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:22.126014434Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1myr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:29.588506782Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1wfo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:17.758490361Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-1wma","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:25.615713679Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-23c3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:51.247126567Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-23vv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:13.455024617Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-2cdo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:47.291286694Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-cccv","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:30:45.064849002Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","depends_on_id":"bd-u7t7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T00:33:09.637216566Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":474,"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"All 10 publish blockers now closed. Version alignment check:
- asupersync: local=0.1.0, crates.io=0.1.0 (match)
- rich_rust: local=0.1.1, crates.io=0.1.1 (match)
- charmed-*: local=0.1.0, crates.io=0.1.2 (SemVer compatible)
- sqlmodel-*: local=0.1.0, crates.io=0.1.1 (SemVer compatible)
Risk: Local sibling code may have APIs not in published versions. Recommend: test build with crates.io versions before merging. The [patch.crates-io] approach is correct for local dev.","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:36:18Z"},{"id":487,"issue_id":"bd-1qk8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Migration complete. Summary:

1. path= deps already removed (done by earlier agent). Cargo.toml uses version-only deps for all sibling crates.

2. Added documented [patch.crates-io] section (commented) at bottom of Cargo.toml with correct paths for all 10 sibling crates (asupersync, rich_rust, 6 charmed-*, 2 sqlmodel-*). Instructions for git skip-worktree included.

3. CI proof already exists: ci.yml only checks out pi_agent_rust (no sibling repos), and build succeeds on all 3 platforms (ubuntu, macos, windows).

Quality gates: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings all pass.","created_at":"2026-02-06T06:19:26Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1qrp","title":"Update UBS usage in AGENTS.md to current CLI interface","description":"UBS examples in AGENTS.md currently use file-argument form that is unsupported by current UBS CLI. Update commands and fix workflow to documented supported invocations: staged scan, diff scan, CI scan, full scan, and optional timeout wrapper.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"docs","created_at":"2026-02-09T16:03:15.365112843Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T16:05:18.393636239Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T16:05:18.393606384Z","close_reason":"Updated AGENTS UBS section to current CLI invocations (--staged/--diff/project-dir) and corrected fix-loop command","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
